description:
In phase_executor.rs, update the executor entry point (line ~1255):

1. Phase definition lookup (line ~1263): Check workflow_config.config.phase_definitions first, fall back to runtime_loaded.config.phase_execution()

2. Agent profile merge: Merge workflow config agent_profiles into mutable copy of runtime config agents, so all existing accessor methods (phase_system_prompt, phase_tool_override, etc.) work unchanged

3. Tools allowlist: Combine workflow_config.tools_allowlist + runtime_config.tools_allowlist when calling run_workflow_phase_with_command()

This keeps the execution layer changes minimal — just the entry point lookup.
title: Update phase executor lookup to check workflow config first
